description: This file defines a MySQL repository module for managing user target roles and current roles within a career navigation system. It provides functions to insert and retrieve user-specific role data from the `user_targets` table, supporting operations like upserting user target roles, fetching the latest target role, inserting current roles, and fetching the latest current role.

methods.name: upsertUserTargetRole({ userId, roleId, timeHorizon })
methods.description: Inserts a new user target role record into the database. Generates a UUID, captures current timestamp, and saves user ID, role ID, and time horizon.

methods.name: getLatestUserTargetRole({ userId })
methods.description: Retrieves the most recent user target role for a specific user, ordered by update and creation timestamps.

methods.name: upsertUserCurrentRole({ userId, currentRoleTitle, source = 'bedrock' })
methods.description: Inserts a record for the user's current role, including title and source, into the database.

methods.name: getLatestUserCurrentRole({ userId })
methods.description: Fetches the latest current role record for a user based on timestamps.

ctags.name: upsertUserCurrentRole
ctags.pattern: /^export async function upsertUserCurrentRole({ userId, currentRoleTitle, source = 'bedrock' }) {$/

ctags.name: upsertUserTargetRole
ctags.pattern: /^export async function upsertUserTargetRole({ userId, roleId, timeHorizon }) {$/
